name: headroom
install_doc: README: `pip install "headroom-ai[all]"` then `headroom mcp install`. THOL installs the pinned PyPI build (`uv tool install "headroom-ai[all]"`) and declares the stdio MCP server directly.
notes: Compress-Cache-Retrieve PROXY (primary mode). THOL now runs the official auto mode: headroom wrap claude starts the proxy + sets ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL so ALL API traffic is compacted automatically (no agent opt-in). Replaces the earlier MCP-only wiring (which was never adopted by the agent).
